name: paper-autopilot-open-marketplace
description: Open edition battery / materials science paper-writing feedback-loop orchestrator marketplace

plugins.name: paper-autopilot-open
plugins.description: Open edition of a battery / materials science paper-writing feedback-loop orchestrator. Onboarding wizard, dual RAG backend (local vector store by default, Supabase optional), self-built corpus from the user's own papers, and no external plugin hard-dependencies. Includes adversarial review (pa-forcing-questions, pa-spec-review-loop) — still alpha.
